hooks.command: GWT_MANAGED_HOOK=runtime-state sh -lc 'runtime_path="${GWT_SESSION_RUNTIME_PATH:-}"; [ -n "$runtime_path" ] || exit 0; runtime_dir=$(dirname "$runtime_path"); mkdir -p "$runtime_dir" || exit 0; now=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); tmp="${runtime_path}.tmp.$$"; printf "{\"status\":\"%s\",\"updated_at\":\"%s\",\"last_activity_at\":\"%s\",\"source_event\":\"%s\"}" "Running" "$now" "$now" "SessionStart" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$runtime_path"' || true

GWT_MANAGED_HOOK=runtime-state sh -lc 'runtime_path="${GWT_SESSION_RUNTIME_PATH:-}"; [ -n "$runtime_path" ] || exit 0; runtime_dir=$(dirname "$runtime_path"); mkdir -p "$runtime_dir" || exit 0; now=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); tmp="${runtime_path}.tmp.$$"; printf "{\"status\":\"%s\",\"updated_at\":\"%s\",\"last_activity_at\":\"%s\",\"source_event\":\"%s\"}" "Running" "$now" "$now" "UserPromptSubmit" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$runtime_path"' || true

GWT_MANAGED_HOOK=runtime-state sh -lc 'runtime_path="${GWT_SESSION_RUNTIME_PATH:-}"; [ -n "$runtime_path" ] || exit 0; runtime_dir=$(dirname "$runtime_path"); mkdir -p "$runtime_dir" || exit 0; now=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); tmp="${runtime_path}.tmp.$$"; printf "{\"status\":\"%s\",\"updated_at\":\"%s\",\"last_activity_at\":\"%s\",\"source_event\":\"%s\"}" "Running" "$now" "$now" "PreToolUse" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$runtime_path"' || true

GWT_MANAGED_HOOK=runtime-state sh -lc 'runtime_path="${GWT_SESSION_RUNTIME_PATH:-}"; [ -n "$runtime_path" ] || exit 0; runtime_dir=$(dirname "$runtime_path"); mkdir -p "$runtime_dir" || exit 0; now=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); tmp="${runtime_path}.tmp.$$"; printf "{\"status\":\"%s\",\"updated_at\":\"%s\",\"last_activity_at\":\"%s\",\"source_event\":\"%s\"}" "Running" "$now" "$now" "PostToolUse" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$runtime_path"' || true

GWT_MANAGED_HOOK=runtime-state sh -lc 'runtime_path="${GWT_SESSION_RUNTIME_PATH:-}"; [ -n "$runtime_path" ] || exit 0; runtime_dir=$(dirname "$runtime_path"); mkdir -p "$runtime_dir" || exit 0; now=$(date -u +"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ"); tmp="${runtime_path}.tmp.$$"; printf "{\"status\":\"%s\",\"updated_at\":\"%s\",\"last_activity_at\":\"%s\",\"source_event\":\"%s\"}" "WaitingInput" "$now" "$now" "Stop" > "$tmp" && mv "$tmp" "$runtime_path"' || true
